zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon de Joinville I於從1175年到1190年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內喬維爾時，他的父親Geoffroi de Joinville IV40歲，母親Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourt45歲。他於1209年與Ermengarde de Montclair結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1233年5月在他的家鄉，埋葬在法國艾維倫可萊瓦-達阿維倫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon de Joinville I于从1175年到1190年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內喬維爾时，他的父亲Geoffroi de Joinville IV40岁，母亲Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourt45岁。他于1209年与Ermengarde de Montclair结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1233年5月在他的家乡，埋葬在法国艾維倫可萊瓦-達阿維倫。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon de Joinville I was born from 1175 to 1190, in Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Geoffroi de Joinville IV, was 40 and his mother, Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourt, was 45. He married Ermengarde de Montclair in 1209. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in May 1233, in his hometown, and was buried in Clairvaux-d'Aveyron, Aveyron, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon de Joinville I est né du 1175 au 1190, à Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Geoffroi de Joinville IV, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourt, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Ermengarde de Montclair en 1209. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en mai 1233, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Clairvaux-d'Aveyron, Aveyron, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon de Joinville I von 1175 bis 1190 in Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffroi de Joinville IV 40 und seine Mutter Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourt 45. Er hat 1209 Ermengarde de Montclair geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb im Mai 1233 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Clairvaux-d'Aveyron, Aveyron, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Joinville I è nato il da 1175 a 1190 nel Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Geoffroi de Joinville IV, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourt, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Ermengarde de Montclair nel 1209. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel maggio 1233, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Clairvaux-d'Aveyron, Aveyron, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon de Joinville Iがから1175年まで1190年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンジョインヴィルで生まれた時，父Geoffroi de Joinville IVは40歳，母Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourtは45歳であった。1209年にErmengarde de Montclairと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1233年5月に故郷で死去し，フランスエイビーロンクレイルヴァウクス-ド'エイビーロンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon de Joinville I(이)가 1175년 부터 1190년 까지 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 하테-마니 조인빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffroi de Joinville IV(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourt(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1209년 Ermengarde de Montclair(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1233년 5월 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 프랑스 에비런 클레이르바스-드'아비런에 묻혔다.

lv.from 1175 to 1190–May 1233: no 1175. gada līdz 1190. gadam–1233. gada maijs

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Joinville I nasceu de 1175 a 1190, em Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Geoffroi de Joinville IV, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourt, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Ermengarde de Montclair em 1209. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em maio de 1233, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Clairvaux-d'Aveyron, Aveyron, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon de Joinville I родился с 1175 по 1190 в местности джоинвилл, хауте-марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffroi de Joinville IV было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourt, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Ermengarde de Montclair в 1209 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер май 1233 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности клеирваукс-д'авирон, авирон, Франция.

sm.from 1175 to 1190–May 1233: mai le 1175 e o'o I le 1190–Me 1233
sm.from 1175 to 1190: mai le 1175 e o'o I le 1190

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon de Joinville I nació desde 1175 hasta 1190, en Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Geoffroi de Joinville IV, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourt, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Ermengarde de Montclair en 1209. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en mayo de 1233, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Clairvaux-d'Aveyron, Aveyron, Francia.
